targets.rawSql: select count(*) as value from hives where created_at > now() - interval '30 days'

panels.title: Onboarding completion
panels.description: % of hives that completed onboarding (set an intent or persona). A low value = signups landing but not activating — the #1 growth leak.

targets.rawSql: select round(100.0 * count(*) filter (where (intent is not null and intent::text not in ('null','{}','[]')) or preferred_persona is not null) / nullif(count(*),0), 0) as value from hives
select count(distinct h.id) as value from hives h join analytics_events e on e.hive_id = h.id and e.created_at > now() - interval '7 days'

panels.title: Active workers (24h)
panels.description: Distinct workers producing events in the last 24h — daily-active proxy.

targets.rawSql: select count(distinct worker_name) as value from analytics_events where worker_name is not null and created_at > now() - interval '24 hours'

panels.title: Signup funnel (hive lifecycle)
panels.description: Where hives drop off: signed up -> onboarded (intent/persona) -> activated (any event) -> active in 7d -> active in 24h. The gap between adjacent bars is the leak to fix.

targets.rawSql: select stage, hives from ( select 1 ord, 'Signed up' stage, (select count(*) from hives)::int hives union all select 2, 'Onboarded', (select count(*) from hives where (intent is not null and intent::text not in ('null','{}','[]')) or preferred_persona is not null)::int union all select 3, 'Activated', (select count(distinct h.id) from hives h join analytics_events e on e.hive_id=h.id)::int union all select 4, 'Active 7d', (select count(distinct h.id) from hives h join analytics_events e on e.hive_id=h.id and e.created_at>now()-interval '7 days')::int union all select 5, 'Active 24h', (select count(distinct h.id) from hives h join analytics_events e on e.hive_id=h.id and e.created_at>now()-interval '24 hours')::int ) f order by ord

panels.title: Top product actions (30d)
panels.description: What users actually DO (event_name counts, page_view excluded) — the features earning engagement.

targets.rawSql: select event_name, count(*) as events from analytics_events where event_name <> 'page_view' and created_at > now() - interval '30 days' group by event_name order by events desc limit 15
